variants: Malik Booker's expertise lies in cultural anthropology, where he has made significant contributions to the field. He authored the 'Cyanbeam Modulation Script', a notable work that combines his interests in culture and technology. In recognition of his efforts, he received the Firesong Cup, a prestigious award that highlights excellence in anthropological research. Additionally, Malik is an active member of the Frostveil Fermentation Society, where he engages with like-minded enthusiasts. Throughout his academic journey, he benefited greatly from the guidance of his mentor and doctoral advisor, Larissa Zaitseva.
